fields.name: addresseeName
fields.description: Adressee name (e.g. in case of emergency purpose it corresponds to name of the person to be contacted).

fields.name: countryCode
fields.description: Country code of the country (ISO3166-1). E.g. "US" for the United States

fields.name: number
fields.description: Phone number. Composed of digits only. The number of digits depends on the country.
